name: Wyze Labs
one_liner: Smart home products with AI-powered features (person/pet/vehicle detection, smart alerts). All founders ex-Amazon.

founders.name: Yun Zhang
founders.background: Guangdong University of Foreign Studies, Shanghai Jiaotong University, University of Washington. Former Amazon.

name: AiFi
one_liner: World's largest autonomous store platform (AI computer vision for cashierless retail). 80+ stores with Aldi, Carrefour, Verizon.

founders.name: Steve Gu
founders.background: PhD CS from Duke. Former Google X and Apple engineer.

founders.name: Ying Zheng
founders.background: PhD computer vision from Duke. EMBA Stanford. Former Google and Apple.

name: Oasis Labs
one_liner: Privacy-preserving computing platform for AI data privacy. Founded by UC Berkeley professor and MacArthur Fellow Dawn Song.

founders.name: Dawn Song
founders.background: UC Berkeley professor. BS from Tsinghua University. MacArthur Fellow, Guggenheim Fellow. Top researcher in AI security.

name: Beacons.ai
one_liner: AI-powered all-in-one business platform for content creators. $10M+ ARR. Founded by Stanford AI Lab PhDs.

name: AnChain.AI
one_liner: AI-powered blockchain security, anti-money laundering, and compliance platform. Won SEC contracts for crypto monitoring.

founders.name: Victor Fang
founders.background: PhD. Former FireEye/Mandiant AI cybersecurity lead.

founders.name: Ben Wu
founders.background: Former engineering executive at Yahoo, Dell EMC, and Pivotal.
